notes: First-contact visibility check: after one trivial turn the dashboard shows WHICH model the session runs and HOW FULL its context is. codex carries both in the transcript the daemon tails: model_name from turn_context.payload.model, context window from token_count payload.info.model_context_window, utilization from last_token_usage totals via ComputeContextUtilization. The phase DSL asserts the state arc; the model assertion is evidenced by the staged-replay golden AFTER turn_end (summary.model_name = gpt-5.5 at record time). CAVEAT (from the cell assessment): codex replay-golden summaries OMIT context_window/context_utilization keys entirely — the context-utilization half is evidenced by the LIVE metrics surface (verified at record time via the daemon's session push), not by the golden.

text: Turn completes back to ready; SessionMetrics.ModelName = the boot model (gpt-5.5 at record time, not 'unknown') with context utilization > 0 on the live metrics surface
